feedItems.description: allocated £34.5m to Environment & Streets (≈£118 per resident)
allocated £102.9m to Adult Social Care (≈£352 per resident)
allocated £79.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£272 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £107 (5.1%) to £2215
